meaning: n.幕,法案,法令,动作,举动,节目,(戏剧的)幕vi.行动,产生...的效果,担当,表演,假装,表现,见效vt.扮演,装作
examples: You must act boldly and confidently.
This was a fiendish act of wickedness.
Kofi Annan said the horrors of Rwanda had happened because the world failed to act.
The sooner people act on accurate information the sooner the market will set the real price.
